# Resource library
All QCi technologies are created with nanophotonics, enabling diverse but unified capabilities. Learn more about how these groundbreaking techniques will be changing the world of computing, communications, and more. Get started with our Dirac quantum computing systems and start running optimization problems today.
[](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/developer-resources/entropy-quantum-optimization/dirac-quick-start)
## Explore curated content modules
[Introduction to Dirac-3DifficultyThis module will provide you with everything you need to get started with the Dirac-3 system.Application areaQuantum Computing](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/introduction-to-dirac-3)[Introduction to uQRNGDifficultyThis module will help you get started with uQRNG, QCi’s uniform quantum random number generator.Application areaCybersecurity](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/introduction-to-uqrng)[Introduction to reservoir computingDifficultyThis module contains content for understanding and using reservoir computing.Application areaReservoir Computing](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/introduction-to-reservoir-computing)[QCi's unconventional hardwareDifficultyThere are many ways to build a computer other than the classical digital computer. This module will explain why the alternatives are worth exploring.Application areaQuantum Computing +2](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/qcis-unconventional-hardware)[Understanding LightDifficultyLight is fundamental to optical quantum computing. This module will take you through the basics required to understand how light can be used in computing.Application areaQuantum Computing +4](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/understanding-light)[The analog quantum advantageDifficultyUsing quantum machanics to solve problems can be a very difficult effort, but if done correctly, it will be worth it. The following module will go through some of those benefits.Application areaQuantum Computing +1](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/the-analog-quantum-advantage)[Understanding QUBOsDifficultyThis module will help you understand and use QUBOs, a fundamental building block for solving optimization problems.Application areaQuantum Computing](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/understanding-qubos)[Understanding QLCBOsDifficultyThis module will help you understand and use QLBCOs, a fundamental building block for solving optimization problems.Application areaQuantum Computing](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/module/understanding-qlcbos)
Couldn’t find what you are looking for? Reach out to technical support.
[](https://support.quantumcomputinginc.com/)
